rulings.Case Title: ENA NORTH BEACH, INC. VS. 524 UNION STREET ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication By Defendants 524 Union Street And Beverly Smucha
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 27, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT 524 UNION STREET and BEVERLY SMUCHA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication DENIED. Plaintiff's objection regarding insufficient notice is denied. Plaintiff opposed the motion on the merits in depth, and the Court finds waiver per Carlton v. Quint 77 Cal.App.4th 690. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Multiple issues of triable fact, including the duration of due diligence period, the scope of counsel advice received by Plaintiff, the existence of a valid conditional use permit, the representations about Le Bordeaux ABC license and sale of alcohol, etc. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Re 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 27, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT ROGER KUHN, RICHARD SAVAGE, SHERMAN WONG, ALL ANIMALS PROPERTIES, LP, and 1333 NINTH AVENUE, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Re 1st Amended Complaint Continued to February 17, 2017 per stipulation of the parties. Parties are ordered to immediately remit the stipulation fee and provide a copy of the receipt to department 501 no later than 9:00 a.m. on January 27, 2017. In the future parties are to post the fees at the time of the filing of the stipulation and to provide a copy of the proposed order on the stipulation to the department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAPLE D RABB VS. GEORGE E SANTOS COLORADO ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 27, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT GEORGE SANTOS COLORADO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross Complaint GRANTED. Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO STUDENT HOUSING, LP VS. JORDAN GLOBERSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Terminating Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, And Declaration Of Aaron Farmer In Support Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 27, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO STUDENT HOUSING, LP's Motion For Terminating Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant's answer is stricken. Plaintiff may file a Request for Entry of Default and Judgment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ZHAOGUO YU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 27, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT ZHAOGUO YU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer, complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on the breach of lease provisions (e.g. "USE") and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK STEFAN VS. BEN FOLK-WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 27, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT BEN FOLK-WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to allege to compliance with or exemption from SFRO. No opposition filed = (501/REQ)
